title: CobblemonRider
description: Have you played Cobblemon ? Have you wished you could ride your Cobblemon around your world ? Me too ! so i had this mod commissioned for FORGE (and now FABRIC cobblemon 1.5+)to do just that !
body:
Have you wished you could ride your Cobblemon around your world ? Me too ! so i had this mod commissioned for FORGE (and now FABRIC cobblemon 1.5+)to do just that ! I put a demo video [HERE](https://youtu.be/bWtHBqweuH8?feature=shared)


FORGE(only for cobblemon 1.5 below)-config is located in MCfolder>world>serverconfig>PokemonRideConfig.json for servers

FABRIC-config is located in mcfolder>saves>world and is named PokemonRideConfig.json



CONTROLS/FEATURES

- Send out your Cobblemon and CROUCH + RIGHT CLICK interact to get on their backs ,
- press K to dismount (key bind available for this)
-  Click to toggle sprint keybind to SPRINT on your Cobblemon
- Press SPACE to fly up on flyers
- Press/hold your crouch keybind to DECEND swimming and flying
- (if enabled in config in 1.20) hold ALT to pick up entities (keybind available)
- When Swimming , press crouch keybind to submerge,


- ANY Cobblemon can be added to the config with the FLY SWIM, LAVA_SWIM, or WALK tag, to define what they can and cannot do when being ridden ! (such as pokes with SWIM only , cannot move on land when ridden etc)
- Customizable xyz-level positioning for player seating so you’re not sitting inside the cobblemon available in the config
- Multiriding available now, ride wailord and more with your friends!
- LAVA_SWIM tag now available to ride pokes in lava
- Compatibility with cobblemon 1.6 !(1.1.0 on)
- Stamina- Now pokes have a stamina for sprinting that can be configured in the config (world>serverconfig>pokemonrideconfig.json) default is 200 if not specified !
- FORM definition in config - now you can add forms like alola or hisui for different forms of pokes for different seating or speeds. See new config attached below
- Can now add "mustAllowEntityRiding": false, or "mustAllowEntityRiding": true, to the config to enable / disable pick up

 NEW CONFIG:[HERE](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i7olgtgq0bs62q0fi8qzt/pokemonRideConfig.json?rlkey=tmt9otwbjfi5et7gmj7ippyhg&st=m92qtw72&dl=0)

 MOD DEVELOPMENT CREDIT GOES TO :
zanckor 

 *FORGE requires Kotlin for forge* 

If you'd like to support future updates you can donate here, any amount helps :
https://ko-fi.com/xtrm1nati0n
